meta.title: Juan Quintero — Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer
meta.description: Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer with {{years}}+ years building scalable, high-performance web applications, APIs and cloud systems with JavaScript/TypeScript and Python.

hero.tagline: I build scalable, high-performance web applications from frontend to backend.

about.heading: Full-stack engineering, end to end
paragraphs: I'm a Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer with {{years}}+ years of time-served experience across the technology industry. I focus on web full-stack development with JavaScript/TypeScript (React, Angular, Next.js, Node.js) on the frontend and Python (FastAPI, Flask, Django) and Node.js on the backend for APIs and scalable web applications.

I've delivered software for clients in the USA and Colombia — from micro-businesses, entrepreneurs and start-ups to global companies — across FinTech, AI, SaaS, Real Estate, Advertising, EdTech, Analytics, Payment Processing and Enterprise Software.

I'm always eager to learn new technologies and take on whatever a project needs to reach the goal. I bring strong communication, problem-solving and collaboration skills, and an agile mindset to every team I join.
focus: Responsive, accessible web UIs with React, Angular & Next.js
Robust APIs & services with Python and Node.js
Cloud, Docker & CI/CD across AWS, GCP and Azure

skills.heading: Tools & technologies
skills.intro: A pragmatic, full-stack toolkit refined across product, enterprise and start-up environments.

techStack.heading: Technologies I work with
techStack.intro: The languages, frameworks and databases I reach for, ordered by depth of experience.

tools.heading: Tools & platforms
tools.intro: The day-to-day tooling — version control, cloud, CI/CD, testing and editors — behind shipping and running the work.

companies.heading: Companies I've worked with
companies.intro: Employers, clients and partners I've delivered software for.

billtrust.title: Software Engineer
billtrust.summary: Built an analytics reporting module giving a robust overview of payment-processing performance through interactive dashboards and key metrics like Envelope Volume and Payments Processed.
highlights: Developed and enhanced interactive dashboards for key payment-processing metrics
Created detailed drill-down capabilities for envelope and line-item matches in the UI
Integrated databases and storage with middleware for async background jobs
Refactored and optimized frontend and backend code for performance and maintainability

capitol-ai.title: Software Engineer
capitol-ai.summary: Contributed to Capitol.ai, an AI-powered creativity platform that helps artists, writers and marketers generate ideas, create content and streamline their creative workflow.
highlights: Developed and integrated the story/document printing functionality in the UI and AI backend
Identified and fixed bugs across the UI and AI backend services
Refactored the codebase for better performance and maintainability
Improved UI responsiveness and usability across devices and browsers

olive-tree.title: Software Engineer
olive-tree.summary: Developed and maintained a real-estate portal/console for multi-client and tenancy brokers, focused on auto-generating legal, financial and marketing documents like offering memorandums and deal packages.
highlights: Built a module to collect property data and embed it into auto-generated files
Developed and maintained a shared component library for the company's needs
Optimized the company's infrastructure and CI/CD processes
Implemented new features to make broker and sponsor transactions faster

epam.title: Software Engineer
epam.summary: Led two successful migrations of internal enterprise applications to modernize the client's tech stack and infrastructure, working across backend Node.js and React/Angular frontends.
highlights: Migrated two internal applications from legacy technologies
Migrated databases and API endpoints with Snowflake and SAP HANA
Improved the client's infrastructure and tech stack
Resolved numerous bugs and shipped application improvements

perficient.title: Software Engineer
perficient.summary: Built a syndication advertising management console for a multinational IPG client to manage audiences, syndicate and produce data-driven reports.
highlights: Led the syndication module for new implementations and support
Translated client needs into software features and advised the PO on UX
Migrated styles to a new look and feel with deep CSS/SASS expertise
Drove technical vision in Agile ceremonies to optimize business needs

sistecredito.title: Software Developer
sistecredito.summary: Worked on a frontend payment gateway for individual clients and a backend product-recommendation system for an e-commerce web application.
highlights: Built and supported a payment-gateway client application
Reduced company costs by directly integrating payment methods, retiring a third-party gateway
Helped create the Python backend team and product-recommendation services
Defined Python programming standards and good practices

educatic.title: Software Developer
educatic.summary: Built PLEYADES, a web platform that uses machine learning to predict, identify and analyze student dropout across academic programs, with rich data visualization and statistics.
highlights: Implemented software to predict student dropout using ML models
Developed multi-database data services to process academic data
Deployed, maintained and supported web apps and APIs in the client's infrastructure
Improved deployment processes for Python web applications across environments

freelance.title: Software Developer · Freelance
freelance.summary: Delivered web applications and APIs for clients in the academic sector, building curricular-management modules and implementing MEVN/MERN architectures.
highlights: Developed a curricular-management app: academic calendar, configuration and administration
Implemented MEVN and MERN architectures for informatics-department projects
Maintained relational and logical database models in Oracle Data Modeler
Provided support across multiple applications for academic users

projects.heading: Featured work
projects.intro: Selected case studies drawn from production work across FinTech, AI, real estate, advertising and analytics.

payment-analytics.title: Payment Analytics Dashboard
payment-analytics.blurb: An analytics reporting module that surfaces payment-processing performance through interactive dashboards and key metrics, with drill-downs and PDF/CSV/XLS export.
highlights: Interactive dashboards for Envelope Volume & Payments Processed
Drill-down into envelope and line-item matches
Async background jobs with Snowflake & MongoDB

ai-creativity.title: AI Creativity Platform
ai-creativity.blurb: An AI-powered platform that helps creative professionals generate ideas, create content and improve productivity, with real-time document tooling.
highlights: Story/document printing across UI and AI backend
Real-time features over WebSockets
Performance and responsiveness improvements

real-estate.title: Real Estate Automation Platform
real-estate.blurb: A multi-client broker console that auto-generates legal, financial and marketing documents — offering memorandums, deal packages and more.
highlights: Property-data collection embedded into generated files
Shared component library for the platform
Optimized infrastructure & CI/CD on GCP with Pulumi

enterprise-migration.title: Enterprise App Migrations
enterprise-migration.blurb: Two successful migrations of internal enterprise applications, modernizing the tech stack across Node.js services and React/Angular frontends.
highlights: Database & API migration with Snowflake and SAP HANA
Modernized legacy apps to NodeTS and Angular
Improved infrastructure and developer workflows

advertising-console.title: Advertising Management Console
advertising-console.blurb: A syndication advertising console for a multinational client to manage audiences, syndicate and produce data-driven reports.
highlights: Led the syndication module end to end
Data visualizations with D3.js
State management with NgRx & RxJS

payment-gateway.title: Payment Gateway & Recommendations
payment-gateway.blurb: A frontend payment gateway for individual clients plus a backend product-recommendation system for an e-commerce application.
highlights: Direct payment-method integration, retiring a third-party gateway
Product-recommendation data services in Python
Defined backend standards for a new Python team

dropout-prediction.title: Student Dropout Prediction (PLEYADES)
dropout-prediction.blurb: A web platform using machine learning to predict, identify and analyze student dropout across academic programs, with rich data visualization.
highlights: ML dropout-prediction models with Scikit-learn & Pandas
Multi-database data services for academic data
Interactive statistics and visualizations with Plotly

contact.heading: Let's build something
contact.intro: I'm open to senior full-stack roles and interesting collaborations. The fastest way to reach me is by email — or connect on any of the platforms below.
